newsroom.empty: No stories in this category right now.

article.autoTranslatedHint: Parts of this story were machine-translated from English. The original source may read differently.

careersPage.title: Careers at Vibo

careersPage.footnote: Thank you for your interest in joining the team.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Ideas, stories, case studies, and guides from the Vibo team.
blog.empty: No posts yet. Check back soon.
blog.convexMissing: Convex URL is missing. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL (or CONVEX_URL) to .env.local and restart the dev server.
blog.notFound: This post could not be found.
blog.sectionHeading: Stories, guides, and updates from Vibo.
blog.sectionEmpty: Stories will appear here once published from the blog management area.
blog.translateNotConfigured: Arabic copy for this post is not available yet. Add LIBRETRANSLATE_API_KEY to your server environment (see .env.example) and restart the dev server so English posts can be machine-translated when Arabic fields are empty in the CMS.
blog.translateFailedShort: Machine translation is temporarily unavailable. Try again later, or add Arabic text in blog management.
blog.autoTranslatedHint: Parts of this post were machine-translated from English. Official Arabic copy may differ.

blogManagement.title: Blog management
blogManagement.slugHint: Appears as joinvibo.com/blogs/your-slug — use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
blogManagement.bodyHint: Use the toolbar for headings, bold, colors, lists, and links.
blogManagement.publishHint: Use “Publish post” to show this on /blogs. Use “Save as draft” to hide it until you publish later.
blogManagement.configuredHint: Admin login uses server environment variables (never commit passwords to Git).
blogManagement.bodyHintAr: Shown when visitors choose Arabic on the site. Leave empty to use the English version.

hero.headline: Vibo
hero.subtitle: Vibo is a social media platform for short video, photos, and real moments. Download the Vibo app to share Vibo videos and posts with people around the world.

seo.whatBody: Vibo is a social media platform where you share videos and posts, discover creators, and stay in touch with friends. Use the Vibo app on your phone to scroll a personalized feed, post stories, and join conversations — built for authentic expression.
seo.whyBody: Vibo blends short video, stories, and messaging in one experience designed for creators and everyday users. The platform emphasizes discovery, safety, and community — so your Vibo videos and posts reach people who care about your niche.
features: Short-form video and a dynamic For You experience
Stories, messaging, and creator tools in one app
Privacy controls and reporting to help keep the community safe

about.statement: Vibo is where creativity meets community. A space for everyone to share their story, discover new perspectives, connect with the world, and find the things that truly move them. We believe every person has something worth sharing.

page.title: Where creativity meets community.
page.lede: We are building a social home for short video, photos, and real moments—a feed that feels personal, tools that respect your voice, and a community culture grounded in safety and care.

pillars.title: Real stories first
pillars.body: We design for honest moments, not endless polish—so posting feels natural whether you are a creator or sharing with friends.

pillars.title: Discovery that feels yours
pillars.body: Short-form video, stories, and messaging live in one flow so you can explore, reply, and stay close to the niches you love.

pillars.title: Safety you can feel
pillars.body: Thoughtful policies, reporting, and privacy controls help keep the space brave for expression and respectful for everyone.

page.storyBody: Creators and everyday sharers deserve a platform that highlights their voice instead of burying it. Vibo brings together a dynamic For You experience, lightweight publishing, and conversation—built for authentic expression and lasting connection.
page.featuresTitle: What you will find in the app
features: Short-form video with a feed tuned to your interests
Stories, messaging, and creator tools in one experience
Privacy settings and reporting designed for a healthier community
page.ctaBody: Download Vibo, scroll your feed, and share a moment that matters to you.

phone.label: The App Experience
phone.heading: Your world, your feed, your way.
phone.description: Scroll through an endless stream of content tailored just for you. Like, comment, share, and connect with creators from around the globe — all from one powerful app.

bentoHeading: Built for creators, designed for everyone.

bento.label: Short Videos
bento.heading: Create and share short videos that captivate, inspire, and start conversations.

bento.label: Stories
bento.heading: Share your day, your way. Moments that disappear but leave a lasting impression.

bento.label: Messaging
bento.heading: Stay connected with the people who matter most to you.

bento.label: Explore
bento.heading: Discover trends, creators, and content curated just for you.

bento.label: For Every Creator
bento.heading: Tools, reach, and community to grow your voice.

creators.label: Creator Spotlight
creators.heading: Meet the voices shaping Vibo.
creators.description: From storytellers to artists, dancers to educators — our creators are redefining what social media can be.

cinematic.label: The Vibo Experience
cinematic.heading: Where every scroll tells a story.
cinematic.description: Immerse yourself in a world of authentic content — from breathtaking visuals to raw, unfiltered moments that bring people together.

safety.heading: Your safety is our priority.
safety.description: We're committed to creating a safe, supportive environment where everyone can express themselves freely. Our tools and policies are designed to protect our community.

features.title: Content Moderation
features.description: AI-powered systems review content 24/7 to keep the community safe and welcoming.

features.title: Privacy Controls
features.description: Full control over who sees your content, messages you, and interacts with your profile.

features.title: Transparency Reports
features.description: Regular reports on how we enforce our community guidelines and protect users.

cta.heading: Start your story on Vibo.
cta.subtitle: Download the app and join millions of creators, storytellers, and explorers around the world.

newsroomManagement.title: Newsroom management
newsroomManagement.subtitle: Fetch latest articles, review them, and approve per article to publish in the public Newsroom.
newsroomManagement.empty: No draft articles in this category yet. Click “Fetch latest”.
newsroomManagement.notAuthorized: Please sign in to moderate news.

hero.subtitle: Grow your business, push creative boundaries, and build lasting connections, all in one place.

businesses.objectivesLabel: What do you want to achieve?
businesses.objectivesHeading: Get results that matter throughout the customer journey.

goals.title: Grow awareness.
goals.text: Share content and test different formats so more people discover your brand and products.

goals.title: Get new customers.
goals.text: Encourage people to purchase your product or service by clicking through to your website.

goals.title: Build relationships.
goals.text: Grow your community by encouraging conversations through messages and comments.

verifiedUsers.heading: Vibo verification
verifiedUsers.subtitle: Pick the right verified account for individuals, businesses, and government.

individuals.title: Verified Individuals
individuals.description: Creators and personal profiles that want stronger credibility and safer community interactions.

business.title: Verified Businesses
business.description: Brands and companies that need trusted presence for campaigns, commerce, and customer communication.

government.title: Verified Government
government.description: Public institutions that share official updates, awareness campaigns, and service announcements.

businesses.creativeHeading: Experiment with Vibo's creative tools to find what resonates with your community.
businesses.creativeLead: Use features like short form video, Remix, and product tags to put your spin on trends.
businesses.creativeBody: Start your own momentum and reach people who are most likely to be interested in your business.

reelComment.message: This collab is everything ✨ Love the energy, already shared with my friends!

steps: Step 1: Choose a post to boost.
Step 3: Set a budget and duration.
Step 4: Review and launch your ad.
stepDetails: Pick a post that shows your product or story well. It becomes the creative people see in the feed.
Reach people similar to your best customers, or build a custom audience by interests, age, and location.
Choose a comfortable daily or total spend and how long the campaign runs. You can adjust anytime.
Double check your creative, audience, and budget, then go live. Pause or edit whenever you need.

phoneUi.budgetFootnote: You won't be charged more than your cap.

businesses.insightsBody: Performance insights can help you unlock your ad's success. Then use what you learn to make more effective ads.

growthCards.title: Measure what matters
growthCards.body: Track reach, engagement, and results so you can see what resonates, and scale the creative and audiences that work.

growthCards.title: Campaigns in one flow
growthCards.body: Run boosts and manage creative from the Vibo app: pick a post, define your audience, set budget, and launch without juggling extra tools.

growthCards.title: Talk to our business team
growthCards.body: Partnerships, media plans, or product questions? Reach us through the contact form below. We reply from businesses@joinvibo.com.

businesses.growthCtaBody: Download the app to run campaigns and measure performance, or message our team and we’ll help you plan your next step.
businesses.faqSub: Got questions about Vibo ads? We've got answers.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Tell us about your brand and how you want to advertise on Vibo. Our team reads every message.
contact.teamBlurb: For partnerships, advertising, and business questions, email us or use the form. We reply from our business inbox.
contact.companyEmailHelp: Use a work email on your company domain. Personal addresses (Gmail, Yahoo, etc.) cannot be used.
contact.successBody: We sent a confirmation to your company email. Our team also received your details and will follow up soon.
contact.successBodySandbox: Your message was delivered to our team inbox. A confirmation email could not be sent yet (our email provider is in test mode until our domain is verified). We’ll still reply to you at the address you entered.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or email businesses@joinvibo.com.
contact.errorCompanyEmail: Please use your company email address, not a personal inbox.

faqs.q: How can I make the best possible ad?
faqs.a: Lead with a clear hook in the first seconds, show real product or service benefits, and use high quality visuals. Test variations in creative and audience, then scale what performs best.

faqs.q: How do I find my target audience?
faqs.a: Start from people similar to your existing followers or customers, then refine by interests, behaviors, and geography. Let early results guide which segments to expand or narrow.

faqs.q: What insights can I gain from my ads?
faqs.a: You can track reach, engagement, clicks, and conversions depending on your objective. Use breakdowns to see which creatives and audiences drive the most efficient results.

faqs.q: How can I get started advertising on Vibo?
faqs.a: Install Vibo, set up your business profile, pick a post or creative to promote, choose your goal and budget, then launch. Our team is expanding self serve tools. Stay tuned for updates.
